data.name: Godling Harem
data.detailed_description:
Play as a fallen god that's given a chance to reclaim godhood. As a godling, you must save the world from dark forces that only a god can truly repel. Gain back followers and their faith, which makes you stronger. With faith, you can upgrade your skills to better fight the forces of darkness. But that's not all you face.

You must also reclaim your authority from the four kingdoms that have betrayed you in the past and turned to atheism. As a god, you must gain back their submission to your divine rule. Accept offerings and grow your harem of royalty and nobles, which further increases your powers and authority.

The game features classic, simple turn-based combat with Quick Time Events. Some enemies are immune to certain types of damage, so you must use your skills wisely. The game features numerous enemies from monsters to human armies. You must defeat both on your path to regain godhood.

The game's world is in 2D pixel open world, where you explore the various towns and cities you must save. The game features a linear progression and plot with optional enemies to challenge and grind.

In regards to the harem part of the game, you can communicate with its members and train them as well as let them serve you. This content features adult content that combines 2D art and pixel graphics that are animated. It also includes voice acting. All content is fully uncensored.

data.short_description: You've fallen from godhood to a godling that has lost much of your powers, but you're given a second chance. Save the world and gain back your powers, grow your harem of royals and nobles, and ascend back into godhood in this 2D RPG featuring animated adult content.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
